---
title: Blog
description: "Deep science. Built from scratch. Shared openly."
highlight-style: atom-one
listing:
  contents:
    - posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  feed: true
  image-height: 150px
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, categories, reading-time]
  page-size: 15
image-align: left
page-layout: article
image: images/profile-pic.png
css: assets/listing.css
---
